Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Lounging about as usual, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}If you're gonna ask me to go back, the answer's still no.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I was just making sure you were still around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}We've known each other a long time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}It's been almost fourteen years since we met at the orphanage.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}You, me, and Miki. We used to run around here until the sun went down.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Back then, it seemed like we had all the time in the world.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Hah. You haven't changed one bit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}If you wanna get all sappy, go do it with your other pals.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}It's rare for you to think about the past. Usually, you just charge ahead like a damn fool.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}You've never been good at hiding shit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Everyone thinks about the past. Even me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Anyway, we finally know how to get rid of Tartarus and the Dark Hour.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}The thing is, all I've cared about until now is getting stronger. Everything else came second.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}But yesterday, someone made me question my reason for fighting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Your reason for fighting, huh.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}It's different for everyone. But if you don't have a good one, you can always quit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Man, I can't believe I'm the one getting lectured here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Hmph. You really haven't changed at all.[n]{f 1 1}
